title: Handle skip responses in GitHub Action
body:
## Summary

When the platform returns a skip result (actor not member, no entitlement, solo namespace violation), the GitHub Action should post an informative PR comment and exit gracefully.

## Context

Instead of failing the workflow when auth fails, we want to:
1. Post a helpful comment explaining why review was skipped
2. Exit with code 0 (don't fail the workflow)
3. Let users know how to resolve the issue

## Deliverables

### Skip Handling in Review Command
**File:** `cmd/bop/review.go`

```go
func handleReviewCommand(ctx context.Context) error {
    result, err := auth.OIDCAuthenticate(ctx)
    if err != nil {
        return err
    }

    if result.Skip != nil {
        // Post comment explaining why review was skipped
        if err := github.PostPRComment(ctx, result.Skip.Comment); err != nil {
            log.Printf("Warning: failed to post skip comment: %v", err)
        }
        log.Printf("Review skipped: %s", result.Skip.Reason)
        return nil  // Exit 0 - don't fail the workflow
    }

    // Continue with review...
}
```

### GitHub Comment Posting

Add function to post PR comments using the GitHub token from OIDC:

```go
func PostPRComment(ctx context.Context, body string) error {
    // Use GITHUB_TOKEN from environment
    // Post to PR from GITHUB_EVENT_PATH
}
```

### Skip Reasons and Comments

| Reason | User sees |
|--------|-----------|
| `actor_not_member` | "Actor @user is not a bop member..." |
| `no_active_entitlement` | "Actor @user does not have an active subscription..." |
| `solo_namespace_violation` | "Actor @user has a Solo plan... requires Pro plan" |

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Skip detection from OIDC response
- [ ] PR comment posting with skip message
- [ ] Exit 0 on skip (don't fail workflow)
- [ ] Graceful handling if comment posting fails
- [ ] Log skip reason for debugging
- [ ] Integration test with mocked responses

## Depends On

- #318 (Update StoredAuth for actor model)

## Related Platform Issues

- delightfulhammers/platform#304 (Skip behavior with PR comments)

## Labels

- `auth`
- `github-action`
- `phase-3`
- `actor-model`
